notes: Core mechanics are present but ghost AI has pathing issues, wall collision detection is unreliable (ghosts/pac can clip through walls), the maze rendering uses hollow stroke rectangles instead of proper filled walls making it look skeletal, and the ghost house exit logic is buggy causing ghosts to sometimes get stuck.
An impressive and highly functional Pac-Man clone with accurate ghost AI, smooth cornering, and complete core mechanics, though visually simplified with blocky walls.

A solid and mostly complete Pac-Man clone with working movement, pellets, ghosts, power mode, lives, and progression, but simplified wall visuals and several behavior inaccuracies keep it well short of a faithful or flawless build.
